---
title: "Margaret Agnes Paul"
---

## Margaret Agnes Paul

**Dates:** (1829-1905)

**Maiden name:** (Colvile)

### Description

novelist,  first cousin of Jemima (Wedderburn) Blackburn

### Biography

Their fathers, Andrew Colvile <i>né</i> Wedderburn (1779-1856) and James Wedderburn (1782-1822) were brothers.  Colvile married (12 December 1856) the Rev. Charles Kegan Paul (1828-1902). Her first novel was <i>Dorothy: A Tale</i> (1856).  [ Burke, Peerage 1949, Ogilvy-Wedderburn, Bt.; ODNB Kegan Paul.]

### Letters

- Letter from Jany 10th 1861 
- Letter from March 17th [1856]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
